description: Use this API to specify or return the page length limits for the four output devices; also retrieve device names. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.0.0. ierr = lines_per_page(ival) ierr, ival,devnam = lines_per_page()

parameters.name: ival
parameters.description: An array of four elements specifying the page length limits. (input; if Batch command, or for Python if specified as an argument, or for Fortran if IOCODE is 0, unchanged by default; else output).

ival.description: lines per page for disk files (no change by default).
lines per page for the report window (no change by default).
lines per page for the first primary hard copy device (no change by default).
lines per page for the second primary hard copy device (no change by default).

devnam.description: name of first primary hard copy device.
name of second primary hard copy device.

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
